creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 175896
turnserver 4.5.0.5

Bump to the latest upstream release. This release includes two new
utilities: turnutils_natdiscovery and turnutils_oauth. Install both
along with their manpages.
    
Take over maintainership from Oleg Moskalenko.
    
http://turnserver.open-sys.org/downloads/v4.5.0.5/ChangeLog
